AI Fundamentals

One platform

The complete learning lifecycle,
without the integration headaches.

01
Enrol
Add students via CSV, manual entry, SSO, or self-registration with custom approval workflows.
02
Assign
Assign tests and courses with due dates, access codes, and attempt limits.
03
Learn
Students access lessons (video, PDF, HTML), live Zoom sessions, and proctored tests.
04
Assess
Configurable tests: shuffled questions, negative marking, multi-section, timed or windowed.
05
Analyse
Score distributions, question difficulty, cohort comparisons, and completion rates.
06
Certify
Auto-issue branded certificates with public verification codes.

Platform Capabilities

Everything in one platform.
Nothing bolted on.

Powerful Test Engine

Timed or windowed tests, multi-section, shuffled questions and options, negative marking, partial scoring, and auto-submit on expiry.

  • Access code protection
  • Anti-tab switching detection
  • Auto-save every 30 seconds
  • Resume on browser refresh
Introduction to AI Video
Core Concepts PDF
Hands-on Exercises HTML
Final Assessment Test
Certification Cert
60% complete

Structured Course Builder

Mix lessons (video, PDF, HTML), embedded tests, and live sessions into sequenced learning paths with completion gating.

  • YouTube, Vimeo, S3 video support
  • Rich HTML lesson editor
  • Due dates and progress tracking
  • Duplicate and reuse courses

Zoom Live Sessions

Schedule and run Zoom sessions inside the platform. Auto-track attendance, download recordings, and turn sessions into lessons automatically.

  • OAuth Zoom integration
  • Webhook-based attendance tracking
  • Auto recording → S3 → Lesson
  • Student join links in-platform

Deep Analytics

Score distributions, question-level difficulty analysis, cohort comparisons, and item-by-item completion breakdowns for courses.

  • Per-question difficulty scoring
  • Section-wise performance
  • Export results as CSV
  • Course completion funnels

AI Fundamentals Program
Authorised Signatory
Verify online

Branded Certificates

Auto-issue certificates on test pass or course completion. Customise with your logo, colours, and signatory. Every cert has a unique public verification code.

  • Auto-generated on completion
  • Public verification URL
  • Downloadable & shareable
  • Custom template per test/course
SnapSkill LMS
Acme Corp
340 learners
TechCo
128 learners
FinBank
589 learners
JWT · HTTP-only Cookies
Google & MS SSO
Data isolation

Multi-Tenant & Secure

Every organisation gets its own isolated environment, custom branding, and SSO config. Built on strict multi-tenancy — no data leaks between orgs.

  • Org-level branding & custom domain
  • Google & Microsoft SSO per org
  • Role-based access (Super Admin / Org Admin / Student)
  • JWT with HTTP-only cookies

Student Experience

Tests students don't dread.
Courses they actually finish.

The student interface is fast, mobile-first, and designed to get out of the way. Learners see only what they're assigned, with clear status, deadlines, and next steps.

  • Resumable tests

    Browser refresh or network drop? Answers auto-save every 30 seconds. Students resume exactly where they left off.

  • Mobile-first test taking

    Question palette, timer, and submit — all accessible on a phone or tablet without pinch-zooming or horizontal scrolling.

  • Rich result feedback

    Admin-configurable: show score only, or reveal correct answers with explanations per question.

AI Fundamentals · Q7
18:42
Which technique improves LLM output quality by providing examples in the prompt?
Fine-tuning
Few-shot prompting
RLHF
RAG
← Prev
Next →

For Administrators

Control without complexity.

Question Bank

Build and curate questions with images, multiple correct answers, and per-question scoring overrides. Draft → Active → Archived workflow keeps your bank clean.

Custom Student Fields

Define custom fields (text, number, date, dropdown) that appear in registration forms and student profiles. Required or optional, ordered as you like.

Bulk Operations

Import students via CSV, bulk-assign tests, export results with one click. Template downloads make bulk ops foolproof.

Access Code Control

Generate unique access codes per assignment. View masked, reveal on click, export as CSV, or regenerate individual codes.

Announcement System

Send targeted announcements to all students or specific groups. Schedule for later, set expiry dates, publish or unpublish on demand.

Pending Approvals

Require admin approval for self-registered students. Review, approve, or reject with one click. Auto-approve also available.

Pricing

Simple, transparent pricing.

All plans include onboarding support and a dedicated customer success contact.

Starter
₹999/learner/mo

For teams getting started with structured AI upskilling.

  • Up to 50 learners
  • 3 pre-built learning paths
  • Tests + Courses
  • Basic analytics
  • Email support
Get started
Most Popular
Growth
₹749/learner/mo

For organisations running cohort programs at scale.

  • Up to 500 learners
  • All learning paths + custom content
  • Live sessions (Zoom)
  • Certificates + verification
  • HRMS integration & SSO
  • Manager dashboards
  • Dedicated CSM
Get started
Enterprise
Custom

For large organisations with complex requirements.

  • Unlimited learners
  • Custom branding & domain
  • On-premise option
  • S3 + CloudFront integration
  • SLA-backed support
  • Dedicated implementation team
